Stuart Anderson MP

Listening, Supporting, Delivering for South Shropshire

I'm Stuart Anderson, the Conservative Member of Parliament for South Shropshire. Here, you can find news, campaigns and more about me and what I'm doing in South Shropshire and Parliament.

Sign up to my newsletter

The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

It is a great honour to have been elected as the Conservative Member of Parliament for South Shropshire. I am committed to listening to your concerns, supporting our local community and delivering the services you deserve. Together, we can ensure that South Shropshire remains a fantastic place to live and work.

Read my story here

Health & Social Care Survey

I have launched my Health and Social Care campaign. Please take a few minutes to fill in my survey so I can find the best solutions for health and social care in South Shropshire.

Fill Out Survey

Can you help me?

There are many ways that you can help locally from delivering leaflets, becoming a digital ambassador and supporting in the office. Fill out the form and get involved!
